name: vector-ai-pulse
description: In-editor budget pacing and efficiency insight for metered, agentic AI coding tools (Claude Code and peers) — zero network calls, local-only.

commands.title: Vector AI Pulse: Open Pulse Panel
Vector AI Pulse: Log Manual Entry...
Vector AI Pulse: Reset All Data

vector.aiPulse.cueStyle.description: Status bar cue style. "minimal" shows spend only, "off" hides the item entirely.

vector.aiPulse.pricing.description: Per-million-token USD pricing overrides by model id (exact id, or a prefix ending in "*"). Merged over the built-in defaults; set a model id to override input/output/cacheRead/cacheWrite rates.

vector.aiPulse.trendDays.description: How many days of history the Pulse panel's trend chart covers.

vector.aiPulse.activeSessionWindowMinute.description: A Claude Code session shows as "active" in the Pulse panel if it had activity within this many minutes.

vector.aiPulse.idleSessionWindowMinutes.description: A Claude Code session past the active window still shows as "idle" (not yet closed) if it had activity within this many minutes. Past this, it's treated as closed.

scripts.package: npm run build && npm run lint:privacy && node scripts/package-vsix.mjs
